+{

+  "mission": {
+    "title": "istio: validatingwebhookconfigurations not work with revision",
+    "description": "validatingwebhookconfigurations not work with revision. Requested by 13+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current istio deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your istio version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nhelm list -n istio-system 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working istio installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review istio configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant istio configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nkubectl get configmap -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=istio\n```\n**Bug description**\nvalidatingwebhookconfigurations not work with revision."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for validatingwebhookconfigurations not work with revision",
+        "description": "To fix https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/27501\n\nBefore\n```\n[istio-1.7.2]$ ./bin/istioctl install --set revision=1-7-2\n✔ Istio core installed                                                                                                               \n✔ Istiod installed                         \n```yaml\ninfo\tvalidationController\tReconcile(enter): retry dry-run creation of invalid config\ninfo\tvalidationController\tNot ready to switch validation to fail-closed: dummy invalid config not rejected\ninfo\tvalidationController\tvalidatingwebhookconfiguration istiod-istio-system (failurePolicy=Ignore, resourceVersion=6800611) is up-to-date. No change required.\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nkubectl get events -n istio-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"validatingwebhookconfigurations not work with revision\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "To fix https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/27501\n\nBefore\n```\n[istio-1.7.2]$ ./bin/istioctl install --set revision=1-7-2\n✔ Istio core installed                                                                                                               \n✔ Istiod installed                                                                                                                   \n✔ Ingress",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "info\tvalidationController\tReconcile(enter): retry dry-run creation of invalid config\ninfo\tvalidationController\tNot ready to switch validation to fail-closed: dummy invalid config not rejected\ninfo\tvalidationController\tvalidatingwebhookconfiguration istiod-istio-system (failurePolicy=Ignore, resourceVersion=6800611) is up-to-date. No change required.",
+        "service:\n      name: istiod-1-7-2\n      namespace: istio-system\n      path: /validate\n      port: 443",
+        "service:\n        name: istiod\n        namespace: {{ .Values.global.istioNamespace }}\n        path: \"/validate\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
